heroHeadline: Local. Genuine. Obsessed with getting it right.
body: Neatnik Detailing is a family-owned detailing brand based in Fairfield, Maine. The work is personal without putting anyone in the spotlight — just careful attention to every vehicle that comes through, treated like it belongs to a neighbor.
Cutting corners isn’t part of the brand. A job isn’t done until it’s done right: thorough vacuuming, careful product work, a clean finish on the paint, and the little spots most shops rush past.
Above and beyond isn’t a slogan on a flyer. It’s the standard — stay with the detail until the cabin feels fresh, the exterior looks sharp, and you’d be proud to hand the keys back.

glance.label: Style
glance.value: Family-owned · full attention on every job

expectations.title: Honest talk
expectations.body: You’ll hear what’s actually needed — not an upsell script. If a lighter package will do, that’s what gets recommended.

expectations.title: Steady work ethic
expectations.body: Long days aren’t a problem when the finish still has to look right. Pride shows in the details.

expectations.title: Neighborly service
expectations.body: Mid-Maine isn’t anonymous. Reputation matters, and every vehicle is a chance to earn it.

cta.title: Let’s get your vehicle looking right
cta.body: Reach out with your vehicle type and what you’d like done. You’ll get a clear plan and a fair quote — no pressure, no guesswork.
